title: Subregion ISO Codes
description: The valid list of ISO 3166-2 subregion (subdivision) codes.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the subregion ISO code.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the subregion represented by the ISO code.

isoCode.title: ISO Code
isoCode.description: The ISO 3166-2 code associated with the subregion.

region.title: Region
region.description: The region associated with the subregion.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Region.

status.title: Status
status.description: An indicator as to whether the ISO code is currently in use or was previously used to represent a subregion.
